name: Puente 13
description: Puente 13 (P13) is a Mexican-American Sureño street gang in La Puente, California, founded circa 1953 as the 'Bridgetown Gentlemen' (puente = bridge in Spanish). Mexican Mafia-backed — in 2013, two carnal (leaders) brothers were sentenced to life in federal RICO case. Claims the entire city of La Puente in the San Gabriel Valley. In 2018, 17 members were indicted on identity theft and methamphetamine charges after a DEA/Secret Service investigation that revealed they were smuggling drugs into Pitchess Detention Center. Known for violent criminal activities and illicit contributions to La Eme.
